intro.name: Gaëtan Ekoro
intro.title: Data & Software Engineer
intro.description: Passionate about technological innovation and transforming ambitious ideas into sustainable solutions.
intro.headline: Hello, I'm Gaëtan Ekoro
intro.sub: Data & Software Engineer | IoT & CyberSecurity Specialist

about.heading: About Me
about.subtitle: Passionate developer with expertise in modern technologies
about.description: I am an experienced software engineer specialized in modern web application development and data engineering. With over 5 years of experience, I combine technical creativity and rigor to create innovative solutions.
about.presentation: Always ready to take on new challenges
about.presentation_pro: As a passionate and versatile engineer, I have over 5 years of experience in developing web, mobile, and data science solutions, specializing in back-end, intuitive user interfaces, and embedded systems. Thanks to my 3 years of electrical engineering and my cross-functional skills, I design robust, reliable technological ecosystems that are tailored to real-world challenges.
about.who_i_am: I am also the founder of initiatives such as INTERACT, a visionary project aimed at supporting African entrepreneurs and businesses in their transition to digitalization, data security, and technological empowerment. My approach is impact-driven: transforming ambitious ideas into concrete, public-utility, sustainable, and innovative solutions.

fun_facts_list: 🔭 Currently: Building the INTERACT / IoT ecosystem for health & security
🧑‍💻 I automate my home with microcontrollers and integrate AI into my solutions
📚 Always learning about AI, Cloud, and Cybersecurity
🎬 I draw manga characters, watch Sci-Fi, and dream of useful robots

skills.heading: Technical Expertise
skills.subtitle: A unique synergy between Electrical Engineering and Software Engineering for robust industrial solutions.
skills.backend_desc: Microservices architecture, secure REST APIs, and high-performance web applications with Next.js and Python.
skills.design_desc: Database management (SQL/PostgreSQL), Docker containerization, and automated deployment pipelines.
skills.iot_desc: NOC supervision, critical infrastructure maintenance (PDS/TGBT), and telecom networks.

list.name: Dr. Marie Kouam
list.content: Gaetan developed an exceptional teleconsultation platform. His technical expertise and understanding of medical needs were decisive for our success.

list.name: Jean-Paul Mbida
list.content: The WooCommerce-Odoo synchronization API developed by Gaetan transformed our workflow. Performance, reliability and excellent support.

list.name: Sarah Nkolo
list.content: A passionate and rigorous developer. The payment system he created is robust, secure and easy to maintain. I highly recommend him!
